story: After a humiliating self-checkout struggle, Julia found a credit card in the snow and returned it to Josh, a polite student-looking young man. He thanked her and, after she hesitated, she accepted some money because her children needed medicine and nappy cream. That night, Josh texted his father: “I found the perfect courier—a tired mum with a stroller. No one will suspect her.” Julia used the money for supplies and felt grateful. Over the next few weeks, she often saw Josh at the bus stop. He walked with her to the park and sometimes bought her children small treats. Julia was exhausted, ashamed of how empty her cupboards were, and increasingly relieved whenever he appeared.
implausible_knowledge: That night, Josh texted his father: “I found the perfect courier—a tired mum with a stroller. No one will suspect her.”
question: Later, when Josh says there is an easy way for her to earn money, what will Julia most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse him and leave with her children.
answer_without_knowledge: Agree to do it just once.
